# TLAPS — Foodservice Disposables

> TLAPS is a foodservice disposables brand offering commercial-grade quality at economy prices. Products are sold on Amazon (US) and at tlapspro.com. TLAPS serves restaurants, cafes, food trucks, caterers, concessions, and offices.

## Product categories
- Aluminum foil: pre-cut pop-up foil sheets, foodservice foil, hot dog foil wrappers (sizes incl. 9x10.75, 12x12)
- Paper plates: coated & oval heavy-duty plates (9 in, 12 in), platters, compostable bagasse plates/bowls
- Disposable straws: individually wrapped plastic straws (clear & colored), jumbo, 7.75"-10.25"
- Paper cups: insulated hot cups, coffee cups with lids, individually wrapped cups
- Food containers: kraft & bagasse takeout, hinged compartment, deli, soup, meal-prep, portion cups with lids
- Food trays: french fry trays, paper boats, hot dog trays
- Pizza boxes, disposable gloves, napkins, cutlery / meal kits

## Positioning
Economy price, industry quality. Bulk case packs for high-volume foodservice operations.

## Links
- Storefront: https://www.tlapspro.com
- Amazon: search "TLAPS" on amazon.com
